welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Your journey begins here. Learn the basics and meet your first ally.

quests.title: Welcome, Pathfinder
quests.description: You have arrived in the world of Horizons. A new adventure awaits you beyond every hill and valley.

quests.title: First Steps
quests.description: Gather basic supplies to survive your first day. Find some bread and a leather canteen to keep yourself nourished.

quests.title: Find Sera
quests.description: Locate the wandering guide Sera, who will teach you the ways of crafting and survival in this strange new world.

act_1_arrival.title: Act 1 - Arrival
act_1_arrival.description: Establish yourself in the world. Build shelter, find civilization, and prove your worth.

quests.title: Build a Shelter
quests.description: Gather planks and construct your first shelter. The nights here are unforgiving to the unprepared.

quests.title: Your First Meal
quests.description: Cook your first proper meal. A fed traveler is a living traveler.

quests.title: Stay Hydrated
quests.description: Obtain a leather canteen to carry water on your journeys. Dehydration can be as deadly as any monster.

quests.title: Find a Village
quests.description: Locate the nearest settlement. Civilization means trade, safety, and allies.

quests.title: Meet Guild Master Aren
quests.description: Speak with Guild Master Aren at the village hall. He holds the keys to your future in this land.

quests.title: A Wild Pokemon Appears!
quests.description: Catch your first Pokemon in the wild. These creatures will become your trusted companions.

quests.title: Choose Your Path
quests.description: Decide your initial class or specialization. Use /horizons branch to declare your path.

quests.title: Meet Your Mentor
quests.description: Your chosen path has a mentor waiting for you. Seek them out and begin your specialized training.

quests.title: Create Something
quests.description: Craft your first batch of andesite alloy using the Create mod. This is the foundation of all mechanical engineering.

quests.title: Plant Your First Crop
quests.description: Till the soil and plant seeds. Agriculture is the backbone of any civilization.

tasks.title: Plant a crop and tend to it

quests.title: The First Gate
quests.description: Enter the mysterious dimensional gate and survive its first floor. These gates hold untold power and danger.

quests.title: Descend to Floor 5
quests.description: Push deeper into the gate. Each floor grows more perilous, but the rewards are greater.

quests.title: A New Horizon
quests.description: You have proven yourself capable in combat, craft, and companionship. Act 1 is complete. A wider world awaits.

act_2_first_steps.title: Act 2 - First Steps Into the Wider World
act_2_first_steps.description: Explore Willowmere, meet new allies, choose your faction, and build your first machines.

quests.title: Journey to Willowmere
quests.description: Travel to the bustling town of Willowmere, a crossroads of trade and culture on the plains.

quests.title: Meet Mayor Theron
quests.description: Mayor Theron governs Willowmere with a steady hand. He has tasks for those willing to prove themselves.

quests.title: Meet Vintner Mara
quests.description: Mara runs the vineyard on the outskirts of Willowmere. She can teach you the art of winemaking.

quests.title: Your First Wine
quests.description: Follow Mara's instructions and produce your first bottle of red wine. A fine vintage is always valuable.

quests.title: Hire a Worker
quests.description: Use the colony system to hire your first worker. Delegation is the mark of a true leader.

quests.title: Gate Floor 10
quests.description: Continue your descent through the dimensional gates. Floor 10 presents a significant challenge.

quests.title: Meet Trainer Kira
quests.description: Trainer Kira runs the Pokemon Gym on the plains. She will test your bond with your team.

quests.title: Plains Gym Challenge
quests.description: Defeat Trainer Kira in the Plains Gym. Prove your team's strength to earn the first badge.

quests.title: Build a Train
quests.description: Use the Create mod to construct your first working train. Logistics are key to empire building.

quests.title: Choose Your Allegiance
quests.description: The kingdoms of the world vie for your loyalty. Choose wisely, for your allegiance shapes your destiny.

quests.title: The Spyglass
quests.description: Craft or find a spyglass. The world is vast, and seeing far will serve you well.

quests.title: Fortune in Coins
quests.description: Accumulate 10 gold coins through trade, looting, or labor. Wealth opens doors.

quests.title: Eat a Balanced Diet
quests.description: Consume foods from all nutrition groups. A balanced diet grants lasting vitality.

quests.title: The Three Paths Diverge
quests.description: With the gates conquered to floor 10, three new paths reveal themselves. The world grows larger.

quests.title: Into the Wider World
quests.description: You have established yourself as a force to be reckoned with. The wider world beckons with greater challenges.

act_3_wider_world.title: Act 3 - The Wider World
act_3_wider_world.description: Diplomacy, deeper gates, hidden lore, and the first steps toward the stars.

quests.title: The Bounty Board
quests.description: Discover the bounty board in town. Bounties offer coin and fame to those brave enough to hunt.

quests.title: The Mayor's Plea
quests.description: Mayor Theron needs your help with a growing threat to the region. Hear his plea and decide how to act.

quests.title: The Diplomatic Choice
quests.description: Choose between conquest and diplomacy. Your choice will echo through the kingdoms for generations.

quests.title: Deeper Gates (Floor 20)
quests.description: The gates grow stranger as you descend. Floor 20 challenges even seasoned warriors.

quests.title: The Outdoor Floor
quests.description: A bizarre gate floor that opens to an outdoor biome. Something is deeply wrong with this place.

quests.title: The Voice in the Stone
quests.description: An ancient monolith whispers to you. Listen carefully, for the Precursors speak through stone.

quests.title: Famous Wanderer
quests.description: Your name is known across the land. Speak to at least 10 unique NPCs to earn the title of Explorer.

quests.title: Class Capstone Trial
quests.description: Your mentor presents the ultimate test of your chosen class. Pass, and you master your path.

quests.title: The Sea of Grain
quests.description: Cross the vast Sea of Grain, an endless plain of golden wheat that separates the kingdoms.

quests.title: Three Kingdoms Meeting
quests.description: Attend the summit of the three kingdoms. Your diplomatic skills and fame will determine the outcome.

quests.title: The First Treaty
quests.description: Forge the first treaty between kingdoms. The choice of terms will shape the world's future.

quests.title: The Hidden Library
quests.description: Discover the legendary Hidden Library, a repository of forbidden knowledge from the age of the Precursors.

quests.title: Primitive Telescope
quests.description: Combine a spyglass with Stellaris components to build a primitive telescope. The stars call to you.

quests.title: First Rocket Frame
quests.description: Build the first component of a rocket: the nose cone. The stars are within reach.

quests.title: Gate Floor 30
quests.description: The gate's 30th floor tests every skill you have. Monsters here rival the overworld's greatest threats.

quests.title: Beyond the Horizon
quests.description: The world has expanded beyond imagination. With rocket, treaty, and gate mastery, you step beyond the horizon.

act_4_the_stars.title: Act 4 - The Stars
act_4_the_stars.description: Launch into space, explore the solar system, and uncover the secrets of the Precursors.

quests.title: First Launch
quests.description: Launch your rocket and leave the atmosphere. The surface world grows small beneath you.

quests.title: Lunar Sample
quests.description: Collect a sample from the lunar surface. The moon holds ancient secrets in its dust.

quests.title: Lunar Pokemon
quests.description: Catch 10 unique Pokemon species. Some can only be found in extreme environments.

quests.title: Mars Settlement
quests.description: Establish a permanent settlement on Mars. The red planet is harsh but rich in resources.

quests.title: Gate Floor 35
quests.description: The gate takes on an alien quality at floor 35. These depths were not meant for mortal eyes.

quests.title: Europa Subsurface
quests.description: Explore the subsurface oceans of Europa. Life stirs in these dark waters.

quests.title: Titan Crystals
quests.description: Harvest the strange crystals growing on Titan's surface. They pulse with Precursor energy.

quests.title: The Forge of Souls
quests.description: Deep within the gates lies the Forge of Souls, where weapons of legendary power can be created.

quests.title: Elysium Garden
quests.description: Find the mythical Elysium Garden, a paradise preserved by Precursor technology.

quests.title: Precursor Signal
quests.description: A signal from beyond the solar system. The Precursors are calling. You must answer.

quests.title: The Watcher's Question
quests.description: The Watcher appears and poses a final question. Your answer determines the ending path you walk.

quests.title: Ancient Pokemon
quests.description: Deep within gate floor 76, ancient Pokemon from a forgotten era slumber. Wake and catch one.

quests.title: Memory of the Precursors
quests.description: Access a Precursor memory archive. Their story unfolds before your eyes.

quests.title: Gate Floor 50
quests.description: Floor 50. The deepest any living soul has ventured and returned. What awaits beyond?

quests.title: The Stars Await
quests.description: With the Watcher's question answered and the gates conquered to floor 50, the final act begins.

act_5_convergence.title: Act 5 - Convergence
act_5_convergence.description: The final trial, the council, and the ultimate choice that shapes the world's fate.

quests.title: The Final Trial (Gate 75)
quests.description: Reach gate floor 75. This is the final trial, a gauntlet of everything you have faced before.

quests.title: Council of Kingdoms
quests.description: Attend the final Council of Kingdoms. Every faction leader gathers to decide the world's fate.

quests.title: The Gathering Storm
quests.description: A dimensional storm approaches. The gates are destabilizing. Time is running out.

quests.title: The Watchers' Decision
quests.description: The Watchers reveal themselves fully and present their verdict on humanity's fate.

quests.title: The Five Paths
quests.description: Commit to your ending. Each path leads to a different fate for you and the world.

ending_restoration.title: Ending - Restoration
ending_restoration.description: Restore the Precursor legacy and become the Founder of a new age.

quests.title: Gather 7 Precursor Cores
quests.description: Collect all seven Precursor Cores scattered across the world and the gates. Each pulses with ancient power.

quests.title: Activate Sky Archive
quests.description: Insert the seven cores into the Sky Archive. The Precursor mainframe hums to life.

quests.title: Awakening Ceremony
quests.description: Perform the ancient Awakening Ceremony as detailed in the archive. The world holds its breath.

quests.title: Witness the Rebirth
quests.description: Watch as the Precursor technology reactivates across the world. The old world is reborn.

quests.title: Become the Founder
quests.description: You are the Founder of a new civilization built on the restored legacy of the Precursors.

ending_pilgrim.title: Ending - The Pilgrim
ending_pilgrim.description: Leave the known world behind and cross the veil into the unknown.

quests.title: Build the Veil Vessel
quests.description: Construct a vessel capable of crossing the dimensional veil. It requires components from every world you have visited.

quests.title: Farewell to Friends
quests.description: Say goodbye to the people who helped you on your journey. Each farewell is bittersweet.

tasks.title: Bid farewell to all key NPCs

quests.title: The Last Sunrise
quests.description: Watch the final sunrise from the highest point in the world. Remember this moment forever.

quests.title: Cross the Veil
quests.description: Board the Veil Vessel and cross into the unknown. There is no return.

quests.title: Become the Pilgrim
quests.description: You are the Pilgrim, forever wandering the spaces between worlds, seeking what lies beyond.

ending_steward.title: Ending - The Steward
ending_steward.description: Guard the world against dimensional threats as the eternal Steward.

quests.title: Found the Order
quests.description: Establish the Order of Stewards, a sworn brotherhood dedicated to protecting the world from the gates.

quests.title: Defeat the Anomaly
quests.description: A massive dimensional anomaly threatens the world. Rally the Order and destroy it.

quests.title: Build the Citadel
quests.description: Construct the Steward's Citadel at the convergence of dimensional ley lines.

quests.title: Take the Oath
quests.description: Swear the Steward's Oath in the heart of the Citadel. You bind yourself to the world's protection.

quests.title: Become the Steward
quests.description: You are the Steward, eternal guardian of the gates, protector of the world from what lies beyond.

ending_awakened.title: Ending - The Awakened
ending_awakened.description: Achieve perfect harmony with all Pokemon and transcend mortal limitations.

quests.title: Bond with 8 Pokemon
quests.description: Achieve maximum bond level with 8 different Pokemon. True partnership transcends battle.

quests.title: Find the Awakening Garden
quests.description: Locate the hidden Awakening Garden where the boundary between human and Pokemon blurs.

quests.title: The Awakening Ritual
quests.description: Perform the Awakening Ritual with your bonded Pokemon. Their energy flows through you.

quests.title: Receive the Transformation
quests.description: Your bond with Pokemon has transformed you into something more than human. Feel the change.

quests.title: Become the Awakened
quests.description: You are the Awakened, a being of perfect harmony between human and Pokemon, bridging two worlds.

ending_architect.title: Ending - The Architect-King
ending_architect.description: Unite the kingdoms under one banner and rule as the Architect-King.

quests.title: Found the Capital
quests.description: Establish a grand capital city worthy of a unified kingdom. Build it with your own hands.

quests.title: Establish Outposts
quests.description: Build outposts in each of the three kingdom territories. Your influence spreads across the land.

quests.title: Convince the Factions
quests.description: Through diplomacy, trade, or force, bring each faction to recognize your authority.

quests.title: The Coronation
quests.description: The factions gather for your coronation. The crown is forged from Precursor metal and kingdom gold.

quests.title: Become the Architect-King
quests.description: You are the Architect-King, builder and ruler of a unified world, shaping the future with vision and power.

side_cobblemon_mastery.title: Cobblemon Mastery
side_cobblemon_mastery.description: Master the art of Pokemon training, from your first catch to the Champion title.

quests.title: Novice Collector
quests.description: Catch 5 unique Pokemon. Start building your team.

quests.title: Plains Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Plains Gym Leader and earn your first badge.

quests.title: Seasoned Collector
quests.description: Catch 15 unique Pokemon species.

quests.title: Forest Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Forest Gym Leader.

quests.title: Dedicated Collector
quests.description: Catch 25 unique Pokemon species.

quests.title: Mountain Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Mountain Gym Leader.

quests.title: Expert Collector
quests.description: Catch 40 unique Pokemon species.

quests.title: Desert Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Desert Gym Leader.

quests.title: Master Collector
quests.description: Catch 60 unique Pokemon species across all biomes.

quests.title: Coastal Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Coastal Gym Leader.

quests.title: Legendary Collector
quests.description: Catch 80 unique Pokemon species, including rare types.

quests.title: Tundra Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Tundra Gym Leader.

quests.title: Centurion Collector
quests.description: Catch 100 unique Pokemon species. An incredible achievement.

quests.title: Volcanic Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Volcanic Gym Leader.

quests.title: Twilight Gym Badge
quests.description: Defeat the Twilight Gym Leader, the final gym.

quests.title: Elite Four Challenge
quests.description: Challenge and defeat all four members of the Elite Four in succession.

quests.title: Champion
quests.description: Defeat the reigning Champion and claim the title for yourself. You are the very best.

quests.title: Know Your Types
quests.description: Win a battle using a super-effective type advantage move.

quests.title: Breeding Basics
quests.description: Successfully breed two Pokemon to produce an egg.

quests.title: Perfect Genetics
quests.description: Breed a Pokemon with perfect IVs in at least 3 stats.

quests.title: TM Collector
quests.description: Collect 10 different TMs.

quests.title: TM Hoarder
quests.description: Collect 30 different TMs.

quests.title: Shiny Hunter
quests.description: Catch a shiny Pokemon. Patience and luck are required.

quests.title: Competitive Team
quests.description: Build a team of 6 Pokemon with competitive movesets and natures.

quests.title: Full Evolution Chain
quests.description: Evolve a Pokemon through its complete evolution chain.

quests.title: Legendary Encounter
quests.description: Encounter a legendary Pokemon in the wild or in a gate.

quests.title: Legendary Catcher
quests.description: Catch a legendary Pokemon. The ultimate prize for any trainer.

quests.title: Living Dex
quests.description: Catch one of every Pokemon species available in Horizons. The ultimate collection.

quests.title: Breeding Introduction
quests.description: Set up a Pokemon daycare area with two compatible Pokemon. Learn compatibility groups and egg production timings.

quests.title: Competitive Battling
quests.description: Enter and win a competitive battle tournament. Build a team with proper EVs, IVs, held items, and synergy.

side_merchant_prince.title: Merchant Prince
side_merchant_prince.description: Build a trading empire from a single coin.

quests.title: First Sale
quests.description: Complete your first trade with a merchant NPC.

quests.title: Hundred Coin Hoard
quests.description: Accumulate 100 copper coins.

quests.title: Open a Shop
quests.description: Set up your own trading post or shop.

quests.title: First Trade Route
quests.description: Establish a trade route between two settlements.

quests.title: Three Routes
quests.description: Operate three active trade routes simultaneously.

quests.title: Gold Reserve
quests.description: Accumulate 10 gold coins.

quests.title: Cross-Kingdom Trade
quests.description: Trade with merchants in at least two different kingdoms.

quests.title: Wealthy Merchant
quests.description: Accumulate 50 gold coins.

quests.title: Market Monopoly
quests.description: Control the supply of a single resource across two kingdoms.

quests.title: Multi-Kingdom Network
quests.description: Trade routes spanning all three kingdoms.

quests.title: Hundred Gold
quests.description: Accumulate 100 gold coins. You are fabulously wealthy.

quests.title: Trade War
quests.description: Win an economic conflict against a rival merchant faction.

quests.title: Smuggler's Run
quests.description: Complete a smuggling contract. Not all trade is legal.

quests.title: Open a Bank
quests.description: Establish a banking operation offering loans to NPCs.

quests.title: Auction House
quests.description: Build and operate an auction house.

quests.title: Trade Insurance
quests.description: Insure your trade routes against loss.

quests.title: Interplanetary Trade
quests.description: Establish a trade route to a space colony.

quests.title: Emerald Magnate
quests.description: Accumulate 1000 emeralds worth of total trade volume.

quests.title: Economic Baron
quests.description: You control the world economy. The title of Economic Baron is yours.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Economic Baron

quests.title: Philanthropist
quests.description: Donate 50 gold coins to village improvement projects.

side_master_crafter.title: Master Crafter
side_master_crafter.description: Master the art of mechanical engineering and automation.

quests.title: First Machine
quests.description: Build your first Create mod machine.

quests.title: Water Power
quests.description: Build a water wheel for renewable power.

quests.title: Under Pressure
quests.description: Build and use a mechanical press.

quests.title: Mixing It Up
quests.description: Build and use a mechanical mixer.

quests.title: Deployer Line
quests.description: Set up a deployer-based assembly line.

quests.title: First Train
quests.description: Build and operate your first Create train.

quests.title: Train Network
quests.description: Connect 3 stations with automated train routes.

quests.title: Sequenced Assembly
quests.description: Complete a sequenced assembly recipe.

quests.title: Mechanical Crafter
quests.description: Build a mechanical crafter array.

quests.title: The Brass Age
quests.description: Craft 64 brass ingots.

quests.title: Automated Farm
quests.description: Build a fully automated farm using Create machinery.

quests.title: Automated Smelter
quests.description: Build an automated smelting line.

quests.title: Automated Factory
quests.description: Build a multi-step automated factory producing a complex item.

quests.title: Steam Power
quests.description: Build and power a steam engine.

quests.title: Mechanical Elevator
quests.description: Build a functional elevator using Create contraptions.

quests.title: Flying Machine
quests.description: Build a flying contraption using Create.

quests.title: Mega Train
quests.description: Build a train with 10 or more carriages.

quests.title: Precursor Engineering
quests.description: Reverse-engineer a Precursor artifact using Create machines.

quests.title: Space Factory
quests.description: Build a factory on a space station or planet.

quests.title: 1024 SU
quests.description: Generate 1024 stress units of rotational power.

quests.title: Wireless Redstone
quests.description: Use redstone links for wireless signal transmission.

quests.title: Information Display
quests.description: Set up a display board showing train schedules or factory output.

quests.title: Precursor-Tier Recipes
quests.description: Unlock and craft Precursor-tier items using a combination of Create sequenced assembly and Precursor materials.

quests.title: Automated Defense System
quests.description: Build an automated defense system using Create deployers, redstone links, and dispensers to protect your base.

quests.title: Master Engineer
quests.description: You have mastered the mechanical arts. The title of Master Engineer is yours.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Master Engineer

side_cartographer.title: Cartographer's Journey
side_cartographer.description: Map the world, discover every corner, and chart the unknown.

quests.title: Novice Explorer
quests.description: Discover 5 unique locations.

quests.title: Seasoned Explorer
quests.description: Discover 10 unique locations.

quests.title: Veteran Explorer
quests.description: Discover 25 unique locations.

quests.title: Biome Wanderer
quests.description: Visit every overworld biome type.

quests.title: Village Census
quests.description: Visit every village and settlement.

quests.title: Capital Visitor
quests.description: Visit the capital of every kingdom.

quests.title: Nether Mapped
quests.description: Explore and map the Nether.

quests.title: End Charted
quests.description: Explore and map the End dimension.

quests.title: Lunar Survey
quests.description: Map the Moon's surface.

quests.title: Mars Survey
quests.description: Map the surface of Mars.

quests.title: Planetary Surveyor
quests.description: Map every accessible planet and moon.

quests.title: Secret Spots
quests.description: Discover 5 hidden or secret locations.

quests.title: Gate Cartography
quests.description: Map 20 unique gate floor layouts.

quests.title: Legendary Explorer
quests.description: Discover 50 unique locations. No corner of the world is unknown to you.

quests.title: The Cartographer
quests.description: You have mapped the known world and beyond. The title of Cartographer is yours.

side_lorekeeper.title: Lorekeeper
side_lorekeeper.description: Uncover the history of the Precursors through fragments of ancient knowledge.

quests.title: First Fragment
quests.description: Find your first lore fragment. The Precursors left messages everywhere.

quests.title: Fragment Collector
quests.description: Collect 5 lore fragments.

quests.title: Lorebook I: Origins
quests.description: Find and read the first Lorebook, detailing the origins of the Precursors.

quests.title: Decode Fragment Set 1
quests.description: Decode the first set of encrypted fragments.

quests.title: Lorebook II: The Gates
quests.description: Find the second Lorebook, explaining the purpose of the dimensional gates.

quests.title: Devoted Collector
quests.description: Collect 15 lore fragments.

quests.title: Decode Fragment Set 2
quests.description: Decode the second set of encrypted fragments.

quests.title: Lorebook III: The Watchers
quests.description: Find the third Lorebook about the mysterious Watchers.

quests.title: Obsessed Collector
quests.description: Collect 25 lore fragments.

quests.title: Lorebook IV: The Fall
quests.description: Find the fourth Lorebook detailing the fall of the Precursor civilization.

quests.title: Decode Fragment Set 3
quests.description: Decode the final set of fragments.

quests.title: Lorebook V: The Legacy
quests.description: The final Lorebook reveals the Precursors' ultimate gift to the world.

quests.title: Library Deep Dive
quests.description: Explore the deepest sections of the Hidden Library.

quests.title: Library Puzzle
quests.description: Solve the ancient puzzle hidden in the library.

quests.title: Library Guardian
quests.description: Defeat the Library Guardian, an ancient Precursor defense construct.

quests.title: Ancient Tablet
quests.description: Find and translate an ancient stone tablet.

quests.title: Precursor Language
quests.description: Learn enough of the Precursor language to read their inscriptions.

quests.title: Complete Collection
quests.description: Collect all 40 lore fragments scattered across the world.

quests.title: Precursor Hologram
quests.description: Activate a Precursor holographic recording.

quests.title: The Lorekeeper
quests.description: You have uncovered all the secrets of the Precursors. The title of Lorekeeper is yours.

side_cultivator_path.title: Cultivator's Path
side_cultivator_path.description: Master agriculture, winemaking, and the art of cultivation.

quests.title: First Harvest
quests.description: Harvest your first crop.

quests.title: Diverse Garden
quests.description: Grow 5 different crop types.

quests.title: First Vineyard
quests.description: Plant a vineyard with at least 10 grape vines.

quests.title: First Vintage
quests.description: Produce your first bottle of wine.

quests.title: Master Gardener
quests.description: Grow 10 different crop types.

quests.title: White Vintage
quests.description: Produce a bottle of white wine.

quests.title: Cooking Pot Mastery
quests.description: Cook 5 different recipes in a cooking pot.

quests.title: Prepare a Feast
quests.description: Cook 10 different recipes.

quests.title: Soil Expert
quests.description: Achieve maximum soil quality on a farm plot.

quests.title: Orchard
quests.description: Plant an orchard with at least 5 different fruit tree types.

quests.title: Automated Harvest
quests.description: Automate crop harvesting using Create machinery.

quests.title: Wine Cellar
quests.description: Build a wine cellar to age your wines.

quests.title: Aged Vintage
quests.description: Age a wine for the required period to achieve excellent quality.

quests.title: Complete Vintner
quests.description: Produce every type of wine available.

quests.title: Legendary Vintage
quests.description: Produce a legendary quality wine. The finest in the land.

quests.title: Bee Keeping
quests.description: Set up a bee farm for honey production.

quests.title: Nutrition Master
quests.description: Maintain a perfect nutrition balance for 7 in-game days.

quests.title: Herb Garden
quests.description: Grow every herb type for cooking and potions.

quests.title: Mushroom Farm
quests.description: Cultivate a mushroom farm in a dark environment.

quests.title: Mega Farm
quests.description: Build a farm producing 1000 items per day.

quests.title: Space Garden
quests.description: Grow crops on another planet.

quests.title: Complete Cookbook
quests.description: Cook every recipe in the game.

quests.title: Animal Husbandry
quests.description: Breed 5 different animal types.

quests.title: Rancher
quests.description: Maintain a ranch with 50 or more animals.

quests.title: Pokemon Farm Aid
quests.description: Use a Pokemon with a farming-related ability to assist on your farm.

quests.title: Wine Exporter
quests.description: Sell wine to merchants in all three kingdoms.

quests.title: Greenhouse Builder
quests.description: Build a glass greenhouse to grow crops year-round regardless of weather and season.

quests.title: Cellar Aging Mastery
quests.description: Build an underground cellar at Y level 30 or below. Aging barrels in deep cellars produces higher quality wines faster.

quests.title: Open a Restaurant
quests.description: Build a restaurant with a kitchen, dining area, and menu board. Serve meals to NPCs and other players for coin and reputation.

quests.title: Verdant Soul
quests.description: You are one with the land. The title of Verdant Soul is yours.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Verdant Soul

side_colony_builder.title: Colony Builder
side_colony_builder.description: Build and manage thriving colonies across the land.

quests.title: First Hire
quests.description: Hire your first colony worker.

quests.title: Small Crew
quests.description: Have 5 workers in your colony.

quests.title: Guard Tower
quests.description: Build a guard tower to protect your colony.

quests.title: Colony Tavern
quests.description: Build a tavern for worker morale.

quests.title: Growing Colony
quests.description: Have 10 workers in your colony.

quests.title: Pokemon Work Partners
quests.description: Pair Pokemon with colony workers to boost efficiency.

quests.title: Colony Market
quests.description: Build a marketplace in your colony.

quests.title: Colony School
quests.description: Build a school to train specialized workers.

quests.title: Thriving Colony
quests.description: Have 20 workers in your colony.

quests.title: Second Colony
quests.description: Establish a second colony in a different region.

quests.title: Repel a Raid
quests.description: Successfully defend your colony against a raid.

quests.title: Supply Chain
quests.description: Connect two colonies with an automated supply chain.

quests.title: Third Colony
quests.description: Establish a third colony.

quests.title: 50 Workers
quests.description: Have 50 workers across all colonies.

quests.title: Multi-Colony Network
quests.description: Have all colonies connected and self-sustaining.

quests.title: Space Colony
quests.description: Establish a colony on another planet.

quests.title: Colony Festival
quests.description: Host a festival in your colony.

quests.title: Colony Diplomat
quests.description: Negotiate trade agreements between your colonies and NPC villages.

quests.title: Hundred Strong
quests.description: Have 100 workers across all colonies.

quests.title: Kingdom Builder
quests.description: Your colonies are a kingdom in all but name. Claim the title of Kingdom Builder.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Kingdom Builder

side_trainer_way.title: The Trainer's Way
side_trainer_way.description: Test your skills against every trainer in the world.

quests.title: Fledgling Fighter
quests.description: Win 10 trainer battles.

quests.title: Rising Challenger
quests.description: Win 25 trainer battles.

quests.title: Veteran Battler
quests.description: Win 50 trainer battles.

quests.title: Flawless Victory
quests.description: Win a gym battle without any of your Pokemon fainting.

quests.title: Type Specialist
quests.description: Win 10 battles using a team of a single type.

quests.title: Battle Hardened
quests.description: Win 75 trainer battles.

quests.title: Centurion Battler
quests.description: Win 100 trainer battles.

quests.title: Rival Showdown
quests.description: Defeat your designated rival trainer.

quests.title: Underdog Victory
quests.description: Win a battle where your team is 10 levels lower on average.

quests.title: Winning Streak
quests.description: Win 10 battles in a row without losing.

quests.title: Battle Legend
quests.description: Win 150 trainer battles.

quests.title: Gate Trainer
quests.description: Defeat 10 trainers found within the dimensional gates.

quests.title: All Types Mastered
quests.description: Win a battle with a team representing every Pokemon type.

quests.title: Battle Master
quests.description: Win 200 trainer battles.

quests.title: The Endless Road
quests.description: You have walked the Endless Road of battle. No opponent can stand against you.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Endless Road

side_bounty_hunter.title: Bounty Hunter
side_bounty_hunter.description: Hunt bounties for coin and fame.

quests.title: First Bounty
quests.description: Accept and complete your first bounty.

quests.title: Bounty Tracker
quests.description: Complete 5 bounties.

quests.title: First Live Capture
quests.description: Capture a bounty target alive.

quests.title: Seasoned Hunter
quests.description: Complete 10 bounties.

quests.title: Dangerous Prey
quests.description: Complete a difficult-rated bounty.

quests.title: Pokemon Tracker
quests.description: Use a Pokemon to track a bounty target.

quests.title: Veteran Hunter
quests.description: Complete 20 bounties.

quests.title: Hunters Guild
quests.description: Join the official Hunters Guild.

quests.title: Gate Bounty
quests.description: Complete a bounty inside a dimensional gate.

quests.title: Elite Hunter
quests.description: Complete 35 bounties.

quests.title: Legendary Bounty: The Shadow
quests.description: Hunt the legendary bounty known as The Shadow.

quests.title: Legendary Bounty: The Beast
quests.description: Hunt the legendary bounty known as The Beast.

quests.title: Legendary Bounty: The Wraith
quests.description: Hunt the legendary bounty known as The Wraith.

quests.title: Master Hunter
quests.description: Complete 50 bounties.

quests.title: Space Bounty
quests.description: Complete a bounty on another planet.

quests.title: Bounty Board Champion
quests.description: Clear the entire bounty board at least once.

quests.title: Double Trouble
quests.description: Complete two bounties simultaneously.

quests.title: Ghost Hunter
quests.description: Complete a bounty without taking any damage.

quests.title: Wanted Poster Collection
quests.description: Collect 20 wanted posters from completed bounties.

quests.title: The Iron Hand
quests.description: You are the most feared bounty hunter in the world. The title of Iron Hand is yours.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Iron Hand

side_outlaw.title: Outlaw's Path
side_outlaw.description: Walk the path of the outlaw. Crime may not pay, but it certainly entertains.

quests.title: First Crime
quests.description: Commit your first criminal act. There is no going back.

quests.title: Pickpocket
quests.description: Successfully pickpocket an NPC.

quests.title: Criminal Hideout
quests.description: Establish a hidden base of operations.

quests.title: Great Escape
quests.description: Escape from a guard after being spotted committing a crime.

quests.title: Form a Gang
quests.description: Recruit 3 NPC outlaws to your gang.

quests.title: First Heist
quests.description: Plan and execute a heist on a merchant caravan.

quests.title: The Fence
quests.description: Find a fence to sell your stolen goods.

quests.title: Known Criminal
quests.description: Achieve notoriety level 25.

quests.title: Bribe a Guard
quests.description: Bribe a guard to look the other way.

quests.title: Bank Job
quests.description: Rob a bank. The ultimate heist.

quests.title: Pokemon Accomplice
quests.description: Use a Pokemon to assist in a crime.

quests.title: Infamous Outlaw
quests.description: Achieve notoriety level 50.

quests.title: Criminal Network
quests.description: Establish criminal contacts in all three kingdoms.

quests.title: Master of Disguise
quests.description: Successfully use a disguise to infiltrate a guarded location.

quests.title: Prison Break
quests.description: Break an ally out of prison.

quests.title: Space Pirate
quests.description: Commit piracy in space. Rob a space transport.

quests.title: Criminal Empire
quests.description: Your criminal organization spans the world. You are the kingpin.

quests.title: Public Enemy
quests.description: Achieve notoriety level 100. Everyone knows your name.

quests.title: Redemption Path
quests.description: Pay off your bounty and seek redemption. Optional: leave crime behind.

quests.title: Outlaw Legend
quests.description: You are the most notorious outlaw the world has ever seen. The title of Outlaw Legend is yours.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Outlaw Legend

tutorial_create.title: Tutorial: Create Mod
tutorial_create.description: Learn the basics of the Create mod, from your first alloy to automated assembly.

quests.title: Andesite Alloy
quests.description: Craft andesite alloy by combining andesite and iron nuggets. This is the basic building block of Create.

quests.title: Shafts and Cogwheels
quests.description: Craft shafts and cogwheels. These transmit rotational power between machines.

quests.title: Mechanical Press
quests.description: Build a mechanical press. It compacts and presses items placed beneath it.

quests.title: Water Wheel Power
quests.description: Build a water wheel to generate rotational power from flowing water.

quests.title: Conveyor Belts
quests.description: Craft and place conveyor belts to move items between machines.

quests.title: The Deployer
quests.description: Build a deployer. It can place items, use tools, and interact with the world automatically.

quests.title: Train Basics
quests.description: Learn to build Create trains: tracks, stations, and a basic locomotive.

quests.title: Sequenced Assembly
quests.description: Learn sequenced assembly: multi-step crafting using deployers, presses, and more.

quests.title: Mechanical Crafter
quests.description: Build a grid of mechanical crafters to automate complex recipes.

quests.title: Stress and Speed
quests.description: Understand stress units (SU) and speed. Use a stressometer and speedometer to monitor your systems.

tutorial_cobblemon.title: Tutorial: Cobblemon
tutorial_cobblemon.description: Learn everything about catching, battling, breeding, and training Pokemon.

quests.title: Finding Pokemon
quests.description: Pokemon spawn naturally in the world based on biome and time of day. Walk around to find them.

quests.title: Catching Pokemon
quests.description: Throw a Poke Ball at a wild Pokemon to attempt capture. Weaken them first for better odds.

quests.title: Your First Battle
quests.description: Enter a Pokemon battle. Send out your Pokemon and choose moves to fight.

quests.title: Healing Pokemon
quests.description: Heal your Pokemon at a healing station or with items.

quests.title: Evolution
quests.description: Level up a Pokemon enough to trigger evolution. Watch it transform!

quests.title: Type Effectiveness
quests.description: Learn about type advantages and disadvantages. Fire beats Grass, Water beats Fire, and so on.

quests.title: Pokemon Abilities
quests.description: Discover your Pokemon's ability. Abilities provide passive bonuses in and out of battle.

quests.title: Natures and Stats
quests.description: Learn about Pokemon natures and how they affect stat growth.

quests.title: Breeding Basics
quests.description: Place two compatible Pokemon together to produce an egg. Breeding passes down moves and IVs.

quests.title: TMs and Move Tutors
quests.description: Teach your Pokemon new moves using TMs or visiting a move tutor NPC.

tasks.title: Teach a Pokemon a TM move

quests.title: EV Training
quests.description: Learn about Effort Values (EVs) and how to train specific stats.

quests.title: Competitive Basics
quests.description: Learn the basics of competitive battling: team composition, prediction, and switching.

quests.title: Held Items
quests.description: Give your Pokemon a held item to boost their performance in battle.

quests.title: Party Management
quests.description: Learn to swap Pokemon in your party, send them to storage, and organize your team.

tutorial_survival.title: Tutorial: Survival
tutorial_survival.description: Master the survival mechanics: hydration, temperature, nutrition, and farming.

quests.title: Your Canteen
quests.description: Craft or find a leather canteen. Fill it with water by right-clicking a water source.

quests.title: Purifying Water
quests.description: Purify water before drinking. Unpurified water can make you sick.

quests.title: Temperature Management
quests.description: Monitor your body temperature. Wear appropriate clothing and seek shelter in extreme weather.

quests.title: Food Groups
quests.description: Learn about the different food groups: proteins, grains, fruits, vegetables, and dairy.

quests.title: Nutrition Balance
quests.description: Balance your nutrition by eating from all food groups regularly.

quests.title: Farming Basics
quests.description: Hoe dirt to create farmland. Plant seeds near water and wait for them to grow.

quests.title: Cooking Pot
quests.description: Use a cooking pot to prepare complex meals with better nutrition value.

quests.title: Soil Quality
quests.description: Soil quality affects crop growth. Use compost and crop rotation to maintain rich soil.

tutorial_combat_magic.title: Tutorial: Combat and Magic
tutorial_combat_magic.description: Learn melee combat, dodge mechanics, and the basics of spell casting.

quests.title: Sword Basics
quests.description: Learn basic sword combat: attack, block, and timing.

tasks.title: Defeat an enemy with a sword

quests.title: Dual Wielding
quests.description: Equip weapons in both hands for faster attacks at the cost of blocking.

quests.title: Dodge Roll
quests.description: Learn the dodge roll mechanic to avoid enemy attacks. Timing is everything.

quests.title: Combat Combos
quests.description: Chain attacks together for combo damage. Different weapons have different combo patterns.

quests.title: Introduction to Spells
quests.description: Discover the Iron's Spells mod. Magic is real, and you can learn to wield it.

quests.title: Spell Schools
quests.description: Learn about the different spell schools: Fire, Ice, Lightning, Holy, Blood, and more.

quests.title: Your Spellbook
quests.description: Craft a spellbook to organize and quick-swap between your learned spells.

quests.title: Mage Build
quests.description: Create a full mage loadout: robes, spellbook, wand, and mana potions.

quests.title: Ranged Combat
quests.description: Learn to use bows and crossbows effectively. Aim for headshots for bonus damage.

side_gate_delver.title: Gate Delver
side_gate_delver.description: Conquer the dimensional gates from their shallowest floors to their deepest secrets.

quests.title: First Descent
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 3. The early floors teach the basics of gate combat.

quests.title: Into the Depths
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 10. The difficulty ramps significantly here.

quests.title: First Gate Boss
quests.description: Defeat the Floor 10 boss. Each boss is a unique encounter with special mechanics.

quests.title: Quarter Century
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 25. Rare loot begins appearing at this depth.

quests.title: Gate Pokemon
quests.description: Catch a Pokemon found exclusively inside the gates. Gate-exclusive species are rare and powerful.

quests.title: Deep Delver
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 40. Precursor technology begins appearing in loot at this depth.

quests.title: Legendary Gate Loot
quests.description: Find a Legendary quality item in a gate loot chest.

quests.title: Abyssal Depths
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 60. Few have ventured this deep and lived to tell the tale.

quests.title: Flawless Run
quests.description: Clear 10 consecutive gate floors without dying.

quests.title: Twilight Zone
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 80. The fabric of reality warps at this depth.

quests.title: The Bottom
quests.description: Reach Gate Floor 100. You have reached the absolute bottom. Nothing should exist here, but something does.

quests.title: Precursor Cache
quests.description: Find a hidden Precursor cache within the gates. These contain unique artifacts unavailable anywhere else.

quests.title: Speed Delver
quests.description: Clear floors 1 through 10 in under 30 minutes.

quests.title: Secret Floor
quests.description: Discover a hidden secret floor within the gates. These floors contain unique challenges and lore.

quests.title: Boss Slayer
quests.description: Defeat all gate bosses through floor 100.

quests.title: Gate Master
quests.description: You have conquered every depth. The title of Gate Master is yours.

tasks.title: Claim the title of Gate Master

tutorial_minecolonies.title: Tutorial: MineColonies
tutorial_minecolonies.description: Learn to build and manage your own colony with workers, buildings, and Pokemon.

quests.title: Place a Town Hall
quests.description: Craft and place a Town Hall block to establish your colony. This is the center of all colony operations.

quests.title: Hire a Builder
quests.description: Place a Builder's Hut and assign a colonist as your builder. Builders construct and upgrade all other buildings.

tasks.title: Place a Builder's Hut and hire a builder

quests.title: Upgrade a Hut
quests.description: Upgrade a building to level 2. Higher levels unlock better efficiency and new capabilities for your workers.

quests.title: Payday
quests.description: Pay your workers their wages. In Horizons, workers are paid using Lightman's Currency instead of happiness items.

quests.title: Pokemon Worker Pairing
quests.description: Pair a Pokemon with a colonist worker. Matching the right Pokemon type to a job boosts output by up to 25 percent.

tasks.title: Pair a Pokemon with a worker

quests.title: Multi-Colony Basics
quests.description: Learn how to establish and manage multiple colonies in different regions. Each colony operates independently.

quests.title: Guard System
quests.description: Build a Guard Tower and assign guards to protect your colony. Guards can be paired with Pokemon for enhanced defense.

quests.title: From Colony to Kingdom
quests.description: At level 5 Town Hall with 20 or more workers, your colony qualifies as a minor kingdom. This unlocks diplomacy options.

tutorial_brewing.title: Tutorial: Brewing and Cooking
tutorial_brewing.description: Learn to cook meals, brew beer, and produce fine wines.

quests.title: The Cooking Pot
quests.description: Place a cooking pot over a heat source. This is the foundation of all advanced cooking in Horizons.

tasks.title: Place and use a cooking pot

quests.title: Bake Bread
quests.description: Bake bread in a furnace or cooking pot. Bread is a staple grain that fills the grains nutrition category.

quests.title: Brew Your First Beer
quests.description: Use a fermentation barrel with wheat and water to produce beer. Alcohol provides temporary buffs but has drawbacks.

quests.title: Winemaking
quests.description: Grow grapes in a vineyard and process them into wine using the Vinery mod's wine press and fermentation barrel.

quests.title: Quality System
quests.description: Learn about the quality system. Food and drink quality ranges from Poor to Legendary, affecting nutrition value and buffs.

tasks.title: Produce a Good or higher quality item

quests.title: Legendary Vintage
quests.description: Age a wine in optimal conditions to achieve Legendary quality. Temperature, time, and cellar depth all matter.

tasks.title: Age a wine to Legendary quality

tutorial_lightmans.title: Tutorial: Economy and Currency
tutorial_lightmans.description: Learn the Lightman's Currency economy system: coins, ATMs, shops, and trading.

quests.title: Your First Coin
quests.description: Obtain your first copper coin. Coins drop from mobs, appear in loot chests, and can be earned through work.

quests.title: Using the ATM
quests.description: Find an ATM block in a village or settlement. ATMs let you convert between coin denominations and check your balance.

quests.title: Buy from a Shop
quests.description: Purchase an item from an NPC shop using coins. Shops offer goods unique to their region.

tasks.title: Buy an item from a shop

quests.title: Sell Your Goods
quests.description: Sell items to a merchant NPC. Different merchants pay different prices based on supply and demand.

tasks.title: Sell an item to a merchant

quests.title: Trade Terminal
quests.description: Access a Trade Terminal to browse goods from player-owned shops across the server.

quests.title: Kingdom Currency Exchange
quests.description: Each kingdom has its own exchange rate. Learn how currency values shift based on faction reputation and trade volume.

tutorial_farming.title: Tutorial: Advanced Farming
tutorial_farming.description: Master advanced agriculture: soil quality, crop rotation, composting, and tiered tools.

quests.title: Tilling Soil
quests.description: Use a hoe on grass or dirt to create farmland. Farmland near water stays hydrated and grows crops faster.

quests.title: Planting and Harvesting
quests.description: Plant seeds on tilled soil and wait for them to grow. Harvest fully grown crops to collect food and more seeds.

quests.title: Soil Quality Levels
quests.description: Soil has quality levels from Poor to Perfect. Higher quality means faster growth and better crop yields.

tasks.title: Check soil quality with a hoe

quests.title: Crop Rotation
quests.description: Planting the same crop repeatedly degrades soil. Rotate between different crop families to maintain quality.

quests.title: Composting
quests.description: Build a composter and process organic waste into bone meal. Applying compost to farmland improves soil quality.

quests.title: Tiered Farming Tools
quests.description: Better hoes till larger areas and provide better soil quality bonuses. Upgrade from wood to netherite for maximum efficiency.

tutorial_ftbchunks.title: Tutorial: Chunk Claiming
tutorial_ftbchunks.description: Learn to claim territory, form teams, and manage land.

quests.title: Claim Your First Chunk
quests.description: Open the map (M key) and click to claim chunks. Claimed chunks protect your builds from griefing and mob destruction.

quests.title: Create a Team
quests.description: Create an FTB Team so friends can share claimed chunks, quest progress, and colony access.

quests.title: Invite a Friend
quests.description: Invite another player to your team. Team members can access each other's claimed chunks and share quest progress.

tasks.title: Invite a player to your team

quests.title: Cross-Team Trade
quests.description: Set up a trading area in unclaimed or shared territory. Cross-team trade is essential for the kingdom economy.

quests.title: Force-Loading Chunks
quests.description: Force-load a chunk to keep machines running when you are away. Use sparingly as each player has a limited number.

quests.title: Using the Minimap
quests.description: The FTB Chunks minimap shows claimed territory boundaries. Toggle it with the map key to see your domain.

tutorial_immersive.title: Tutorial: Immersive Engineering
tutorial_immersive.description: Learn industrial power generation, wiring, and steel production.

quests.title: Build a Coke Oven
quests.description: Construct a coke oven multiblock. Coke ovens turn coal into coal coke and produce creosote oil as a byproduct.

quests.title: Thermoelectric Generator
quests.description: Build a thermoelectric generator to produce Forge Energy (FE) from temperature differentials.

quests.title: Wire Connections
quests.description: Use wire coils and connectors to transmit power between machines. Different wire types carry different amounts of power.

quests.title: IE Machines
quests.description: Build and use Immersive Engineering machines: the crusher, arc furnace, and metal press.

quests.title: Steel Production
quests.description: Build a blast furnace multiblock and produce steel ingots. Steel is required for advanced IE machines and Stellaris components.

tutorial_stellaris.title: Tutorial: Space Travel
tutorial_stellaris.description: Learn to build rockets, travel to other planets, and establish space stations.

quests.title: Rocket Components
quests.description: Craft the core rocket components: nose cone, fuel tank, engine, and fins. Each requires steel and advanced materials.

quests.title: Build a Launch Pad
quests.description: Construct a launch pad structure. The pad must be built in an open area with no obstructions above it.

quests.title: Space Suit
quests.description: Craft a full space suit: helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots. You cannot survive in space without one.

quests.title: Moon Landing
quests.description: Launch your rocket and land on the Moon. Collect lunar samples while you are there.

quests.title: Safe Return
quests.description: Return safely to Earth after your Moon mission. You need enough fuel for a return trip.

quests.title: Space Station
quests.description: Build an orbital space station. Stations serve as refueling depots and can house workers and Pokemon.

side_diplomat.title: The Diplomat
side_diplomat.description: Master the art of diplomacy and become the voice of peace between kingdoms.

quests.title: Faction Introduction
quests.description: Reach Friendly reputation with any faction.

quests.title: Dual Allegiance
quests.description: Reach Friendly reputation with two different factions simultaneously.

quests.title: Trusted Advisor
quests.description: Reach Trusted reputation with any faction. This unlocks faction-specific quests and shops.

quests.title: Mediator
quests.description: Successfully mediate a dispute between two warring factions.

quests.title: Three Kingdoms Trusted
quests.description: Reach Trusted reputation with three different factions.

quests.title: Exalted Standing
quests.description: Reach Exalted reputation with any faction. The highest honor a faction can bestow.

quests.title: Forge a Peace Treaty
quests.description: Broker a peace treaty between two kingdoms that were previously at war.

quests.title: Trade Agreement
quests.description: Negotiate a trade agreement between two kingdoms that reduces prices for both.

quests.title: World Ambassador
quests.description: Achieve Trusted or higher reputation with all six factions. You are the voice of unity.

tasks.title: Claim the title of World Ambassador

tutorial_curios.title: Tutorial: Curios and Equipment
tutorial_curios.description: Learn about the Curios accessory system: rings, amulets, belts, and sigils.

quests.title: First Curio
quests.description: Find or craft your first curio accessory. Curios are special items worn in extra equipment slots.

quests.title: Equip a Curio
quests.description: Open your inventory and equip a curio in the appropriate slot. Different curios fit in different slots: ring, necklace, belt, or charm.

quests.title: Curio Stat Bonuses
quests.description: Curios provide passive stat bonuses: health, speed, damage, luck, and more. Hover over a curio to see its stats.

quests.title: The Sigil Slot
quests.description: The Sigil slot is unique to Horizons. Sigils provide powerful themed effects from the Ascension system. They are unlocked after completing Act 3.

quests.title: The Wallet Slot
quests.description: Equip a wallet in the Curios wallet slot. Wallets automatically collect coins and provide storage for currency.

quests.title: Curio Stacking
quests.description: Equip curios in multiple slots simultaneously. Some slot types allow more than one curio to be equipped.

tutorial_cobblemon_advanced.title: Tutorial: Advanced Pokemon
tutorial_cobblemon_advanced.description: Dive deep into IVs, EVs, breeding strategy, egg moves, and mega evolution.

quests.title: Individual Values (IVs)
quests.description: Each Pokemon has hidden IVs from 0 to 31 in every stat. Higher IVs mean higher stats. Check IVs using the summary screen.

quests.title: Effort Values (EVs)
quests.description: Pokemon gain EVs by defeating specific species. EVs boost stats beyond IV potential. Each stat can have up to 252 EVs.

tasks.title: EV train a Pokemon in one stat

quests.title: Strategic Breeding
quests.description: Use a Destiny Knot to pass down 5 IVs and an Everstone to pass down natures. Combine these for optimal Pokemon.

tasks.title: Breed with held items for IV inheritance

quests.title: Egg Moves
quests.description: Some moves can only be learned through breeding. The father passes egg moves to the offspring if compatible.

tasks.title: Breed a Pokemon with an egg move

quests.title: Mega Evolution
quests.description: Some Pokemon can Mega Evolve during battle using a Mega Stone. Mega Evolution dramatically boosts stats and may change type.

tasks.title: Mega Evolve a Pokemon in battle

tutorial_jobs.title: Tutorial: Jobs and Professions
tutorial_jobs.description: Learn about the job system: choosing a profession, earning XP, and leveling up.

quests.title: Choose a Job
quests.description: Use /horizons branch to select your initial profession. Jobs determine your perk tree options and passive bonuses.

quests.title: Earn Job XP
quests.description: Perform actions related to your job to earn job XP. Miners earn XP by mining, farmers by harvesting, trainers by battling.

quests.title: Level Up Your Job
quests.description: Reach job level 5. Each level unlocks new recipes, abilities, or perk tree nodes specific to your profession.

quests.title: Custom Job Perks
quests.description: At job level 10, you unlock a custom perk unique to your profession. Trainers get Pokemon XP boosts, crafters get recipe discounts.

tasks.title: Unlock a custom job perk at level 10
